# Handle Types
Aspire.Hosting.EntityFrameworkCore/Aspire.Hosting.EFMigrationResource [ExposeProperties]

# Capabilities
Aspire.Hosting.EntityFrameworkCore/addEFMigrations(name: string) -> Aspire.Hosting.EntityFrameworkCore/Aspire.Hosting.EFMigrationResource
Aspire.Hosting.EntityFrameworkCore/publishAsMigrationBundle(targetRuntime?: string, selfContained?: boolean) -> Aspire.Hosting.EntityFrameworkCore/Aspire.Hosting.EFMigrationResource
